Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to Chief John "Jack" Blaum, Sr.
Summary: Dedicates a portion of state route 27 to Chief John "Jack" Blaum, Sr. in the town of Brookhaven, county of Suffolk.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to Chief John "Jack" Blaum, Sr.
